description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines a PACKAGE_NAME variable set to gitlab.com/monetha/reputation-go-sdk. Add a single job named "build and test" (default stage) that runs the commands "apk --no-cache add bash" and then "bash -x ./scripts/build.sh". Configure the job to publish the .cover/ directory as an artifact that expires after one month. No additional stages, caches, or rules are required.
